tools.reverse: Reverses the input string. Args: text
tools.lowercase: Converts text to lowercase. Args: text
tools.concat: Concatenates two strings. Args: str1, str2
tools.substring: Extracts substring from position with length. Args: text, start, length

prompt: Reverse 'ABCDEF', convert to lowercase, take substring from position 1 with length 3, then concatenate with 'xyz'.
